title: arenaria tenuifolia var. viscidula
intro: Arenaria tenuifolia var. viscidula, also known as Sticky Yellow Sandwort, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the carnation family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including relieving coughs and reducing inflammation in the body, making it a popular natural remedy in herbal medicine. Arenaria tenuifolia var. viscidula can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to soothe respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
